subcodes.first_line: O thou who art the protector of the divine flock! Thy services, labors, and tribulations in this assembly are remembered and renowned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حامی اغنام الهی خدمات و زحمات و مشقات تو در این انجمن مذکور و معروف
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
